Wear this men's watch to show a man's restrained temperament and always release your masculine sophistication. Previous page Next page 1 Strap 2 Waterproof/Luminous 3 Craftsmanship 4 Adjust the time OLEVE Men's Mechanical Watch Best Holiday Gifts Does this watch need to be manually wound every day? This is a self-winding mechanical watch, but when you stop wearing an automatic watch for a while, it stops walking. At this point, you can manually wind the watch by turning the crown clockwise 40 times. Is the strap comfortable to wear? Made of high-quality leather, this watch is comfortable to wear and easy to adjust. Will the moon phase sub dial of this watch turn automatically? Yes, the moon phase sub-dial of this watch features automatic rotation throughout the day and automatically adjusts according to the time, showing the sun pattern during the day and the moon pattern at night.
